domain: Sardinian launeddas triple-pipe Nuragic polyphonic woodwind (3 pipes: tumbu drone + mancosa + mancosedda; idioglot single reeds; 8th BCE origin; circular breathing for continuous output; melody in 3rds/6ths locked against drone fundamental phase reference)
specific_mechanism: LAUNEDDAS-TRIPLE-LOCK: 3-channel attention-head triplet (1 drone-head + 2 melody-heads) per layer phase-locked against shared drone-reference embedding. (1) Drone-head produces continuous low-frequency reference D_layer = EMA_long(activations) sustained across context window. (2) Two melody-heads synchronize against D_layer: melody_attn = baseline_attn + α·sin(φ_drone-melody(token, D_layer)); φ a learnable phase-locking function. (3) Circular-breathing: drone KV cache persists across context without re-computation. (4) Phase-coherence loss L_coh = ||embed(drone) − project_low(embed(melody))||₂; penalises drift > τ. (5) Triplet coordinated as single unit per layer; 3rd-6th harmonic interval lock between 2 melody heads' learned phase offsets.
llm_application: LAUNEDDAS-TRIPLE-LOCK 3-channel attention-head triplet (drone+2-melody) with shared continuous drone-reference + circular-breathing sustained KV + phase-coherence loss. Differs from R426 HAKA-PHASE-LOCK (single phase-aligned cohort, not 3-channel triplet). R447 MBUTI-HOCKET-DECODE (phase-offset speculative decoder, not drone-reference). R452 HAENYEO-PHASE-DIVE (breath-hold per-expert token release, not multi-head triplet). R094 PHYLLOTAXIS (golden-angle positioning). Differs from TransMLA 2502.07864 (single shared latent KV across all query heads — closest, but 3-channel triplet specific structure missing; LAUNEDDAS adds drone+melody role differentiation + circular-breathing sustained KV semantics + phase-coherence loss). DuoAttention 2410.10819 (dual-channel retrieval/streaming, not 3-channel drone-melody-melody). Differs by THREE-HEAD TRIPLET DRONE+MELODY-MELODY + CIRCULAR-BREATHING SUSTAINED KV REFERENCE + PHASE-COHERENCE LOSS.
novelty_claim: TransMLA + DuoAttention + DeepSeek MLA cover shared-latent-KV multi-head paradigm; 3-channel drone-melody-melody triplet with circular-breathing-sustained KV reference is small recombination — borderline lookup.
